channel.title: Star Trek Relaunch Book Club on Trek Relaunch Book Club
channel.description: Recent content in Star Trek Relaunch Book Club on Trek Relaunch Book Club

item.title: TNG: Death In Winter
item.description: Kicking off the Star Trek: The Next Generation relaunch — a series of novels that continued the adventures of Captain Jean-Luc Picard and the crew of the Enterprise-E after the events of Star Trek: Nemesis — Death in Winter makes a bold move right out of the gate by changing one of the fundamental character relationships from the show… by finally pairing up Picard and Beverly Crusher. The final two two entries of my Prelude to Picard series — with the last review coming next week — deal with books that take place after the (to this point) final appearances of The Next Generation crew on our TV or movie screens.

item.title: Titan: Taking Wing
item.description: This book is next up to be read.
